Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.
Video.title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Image.alt: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle Undertakes a mission to squeeze everything that they can out of a tired Iroc Z.
Video.title: Iroc and So Can You!

Video.summary: The guys squeeze their budget and also do some free fixes to freshen up the budget Iroc’s interior.
Video.title: Low Buck Iroc Interior

Video.summary: Take a look at how SEMA cars are built just a couple of weeks out from the big show
Video.title: SEMA Mustang Thrash

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: The final touches are added to our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Truck project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Image.alt: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Video.summary: Our ’81 Mustang Cobra gets fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: Project Sydewinder get some custom paint and graphics plus demystifying older car terms and labels.
Video.title: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Image.alt: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: You blue oval fans might find a new favorite with our supercharged Ford Mustang bullet.
Video.title: Mustang Fastback

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Video.summary: The '85 Buick is ready for some fit and finish with body work and candy paint.

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.summary: We show you a few tips on wiring up your next project.
Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc almost double the horsepower on a 2008 Ford Crown Victoria P71 Police Interceptor.
Video.title: Cop Brakes, Cop Suspension… Cop Turbo?

Image.alt: Cop Brakes, Cop Suspension… Cop Turbo?
Cop Brakes, Cop Suspension… Cop Turbo?
Cop Brakes, Cop Suspension… Cop Turbo?

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc’s old Crown Vic Interceptor is whistling a new tune with a turbo.
Video.title: Beefing Up a Police Cruiser with New Brakes and Suspension

Image.alt: Beefing Up a Police Cruiser with New Brakes and Suspension
Beefing Up a Police Cruiser with New Brakes and Suspension

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy rip into the automatic transmission.
Video.title: Crown Vic Auto to Manual Swap

Image.alt: Crown Vic Auto to Manual Swap
Crown Vic Auto to Manual Swap
Crown Vic Auto to Manual Swap

Video.summary: We’re transforming a beater ‘74 Bronco into a head-turning beach cruiser.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: How-to man-up a Jeep Wrangler by plucking out the anemic 3.8L V6 and replacing it with a late model Hemi V8.
Video.title: Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap

Image.alt: Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap
Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap
Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap

Video.summary: Tech details on completing a Jeep Hemi engine swap.
Video.title: Hemi JK: V8 Swap Completion

Video.summary: How-to lift our Hemi Jeep with mid-arm suspension and a Dana 44 front diff for more articulation and grip.
Video.title: Hemi JK: Mid-Arm Articulation

Video.summary: We complete our V8 Hemi Wrangler project making it trail ready.
Video.title: Hemi JK: Rock Ready

Video.summary: Hemi Jeep gets Dana 44s with air lockers then a payoff in the rough with off-road suspension designer Rusty Me
Video.title: Hemi JK: Payoff
